message:
fix(compile,audit): resolve happy_eyeballs test errors, remote borrow fix, handler clippy, audit batches 529-530

- src/net/happy_eyeballs.rs: Fixed 10 compile errors from API change.
  Tests used old RaceConnections::new(Vec<ConnectFuture>, ...) signature
  after refactor to new(Vec<SocketAddr>, HappyEyeballsConfig, ...).
  Added #[cfg(test)] from_futures() constructor for test injection.
  Rewrote stagger_schedule_computed_correctly to match start_next() logic.
- src/remote.rs: Fixed borrow checker error in close() test — pin!()
  extends mutable borrow through scope; moved close future into block.
- src/web/handler.rs: Suppressed clippy::needless_pass_by_value on two
  test handler functions that intentionally take HashMap by value for
  .remove() access.
- audit_index.jsonl: Recorded 16 file audits (batches 529-530), all SOUND
  except 3 FIXED (happy_eyeballs, remote, handler).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
